title: Luxury Main River Living in Prestigious Sorrento
description: Sophisticated Luxury Residence with Expansive Golf Course VistasCommanding attention from its elevated northeast aspect on a generous 815sqm block, this architecturally designed masterpiece offers the ultimate in lifestyle and sophistication overlooking the prestigious Glades Golf Course. The home blends contemporary luxury with effortless indoor-outdoor living. An expansive open plan layout connects seamlessly to the outdoors through wide glass sliders, creating a light filled sanctuary with panoramic golf course views.The state-of-the-art kitchen is a showstopper, complete with stone benchtops, waterfall edges, premium integrated appliances, a butler's pantry and elegant pendant lighting. Entertain with ease as the living and dining zones spill onto a spacious, covered alfresco area complete with ceiling fans, heaters and built in fire pit for year-round comfort. The outdoor retreat continues with a sleek infinity edge pool, glass framed spa and a thoughtfully landscaped yard featuring an Olympic size in-ground trampoline. Whether you're hosting friends or soaking in the sunset, this setting is designed to impress. Offering five spacious bedrooms with full height built in robes and striking black cabinetry, the home is anchored by a luxe master suite featuring a large walk-in robe and stunning ensuite. With three designer bathrooms, two powder rooms, multiple living spaces and a dedicated home office, there's room for everyone. A secure four car garage with roller doors and buggy access to the golf course adds ultimate convenience for active lifestyles. Set at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac, your minutes from Somerset College, Bond University, Robina Town Centre and the M1 combining luxury living with everyday convenience. This is a rare opportunity to secure a home of this calibre in one of the Gold Coast's most tightly held enclaves.- Luxury striking residence with expansive golf course views- 5 king size bedrooms, 3 bathrooms + 2 powder rooms- Multiple living areas plus additional home office overlooking golf course- Security roller shutters at the front and rear of the home for the ultimate lock ‘n’ go- Chef's state of the art kitchen with butler's pantry & high-end appliances- Wow factor heated infinity pool and glass framed spa with smartphone control- Alfresco entertaining area with ceiling fans, heaters and natural gas fire pit- Olympic sized in-ground trampoline, perfect playground for kids- Ducted air-conditioning, skylights, and high ceilings throughout- Automated smart home system for climate and pool- Double glazed windows and doors, retractable fly screens- Secure four car garage with roller doors and buggy access to the golf course- Beautifully landscaped gardens, 15kW solar power system- Council Rates $2,114.98/year approx.- Water Rates $1,533.76/year approx.- Body Corporate Fees - $84.53/week approx.- Rental return per week - $2,300 - $2,500 approx.Added 24 November, 2025Property ID: #R2-4792933Show More

title: Private Haven with Pool, Entertaining Area & Modern Charm
description: A Luxe Haven Designed for Effortless Living, Entertaining & Inspired ComfortWelcome to a beautifully curated home where contemporary luxury meets everyday ease. Thoughtfully upgraded throughout, this low-maintenance home is perfectly crafted for families, creatives, and professionals seeking a refined lifestyle with seamless indoor-outdoor flow.Step inside to discover open plan living framed by large sliding doors adorned with security fly screens and deadlocks, inviting abundant natural light while maintaining year-round comfort. All bedrooms feature built-in robes, white shutters, and individual split systems, with the master further enhanced by its own split system and a tranquil private outdoor nook, ideal for a spa, sauna, or creative retreat.Both bathrooms have been fully renovated, showcasing premium finishes including a floating bath and heating lamp, delivering a spa-like experience at home.The kitchen is equipped with Robinhood appliances, a Bosch dishwasher, and a hot & cold Zip tap, ensuring style and convenience at every turn.A dedicated dry room laundry, UV-protected for unpredictable weather, takes the stress out of washing days, while the hallway provides generous double-door storage. An additional workspace offers functionality, complete with black pull-down shutters for privacy when working from home.Entertaining is effortless on the newly renovated deck, complemented by rose gold lighting, stainless steel ceiling fans, and expansive backyard vistas. The showpiece of the property is the heated pool, resting on quality foundations and surrounded by artificial grass, ambient pool lighting, a covered equipment area, and the luxury of an outdoor shower, your own private resort.Sustainability is seamlessly integrated with solar panels, while stylish upgrades such as new flooring enhance the home’s modern aesthetic.Perfectly combining sophistication with practicality, this exceptional property invites you to simply move in and enjoy the lifestyle it promises.Price Disclaimer: This property is being sold without a price & therefore a price guide cannot be provided.
